info.name: SocialGems - Agent Campaign Management
info.description: Agent campaign creation and management endpoints

body.raw:
{
  "role": "agent",
  "agentId": "{{agent_id}}",
  "business_id": "b123...",
  "title": "Summer Sale Campaign",
  "description": "This is a comprehensive campaign for our summer collection. We are looking for influencers who can create engaging content about our latest products. The campaign will run for 2 weeks and we need creative, authentic content that resonates with our target audience. We value quality over quantity.",
  "objective": "brand_awareness",
  "start_date": "2025-11-01",
  "end_date": "2025-11-15",
  "budget": 5000,
  "number_of_influencers": 10,
  "campaign_image": "https://example.com/image.jpg",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "task": "Instagram Post",
      "description": "Create an Instagram post featuring our products",
      "site_id": 4,
      "is_repetitive": "no",
      "requires_url": "yes"
    },
    {
      "task": "TikTok Video",
      "description": "Create a short TikTok video",
      "site_id": 2,
      "is_repetitive": "no",
      "requires_url": "yes"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Agent creates a campaign on behalf of a business. Agent must be assigned to the business.
Get all campaigns created by the agent

item.name: Get Agent Campaigns - Filtered by Business

request.description: Get agent campaigns filtered by business and/or status
Get all campaigns for a specific business (agent must have access to the business)

body.raw:
{
  "role": "staff",
  "staffId": "{{staff_id}}",
  "title": "Holiday Campaign",
  "description": "This is a comprehensive campaign for our holiday collection. We are looking for influencers who can create engaging content about our latest products. The campaign will run for 2 weeks and we need creative, authentic content that resonates with our target audience. We value quality over quantity.",
  "objective": "sales",
  "start_date": "2025-12-01",
  "end_date": "2025-12-15",
  "budget": 3000,
  "number_of_influencers": 5,
  "campaign_image": "https://example.com/holiday.jpg",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "task": "Instagram Reel",
      "description": "Create an Instagram reel",
      "site_id": 4,
      "is_repetitive": "no",
      "requires_url": "yes"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Staff creates a campaign for their business. Business ID is auto-determined from staff record.

body.raw:
{
  "role": "brand",
  "userId": "{{user_id}}",
  "title": "Brand Campaign",
  "description": "This is a comprehensive campaign for our brand. We are looking for influencers who can create engaging content about our latest products. The campaign will run for 2 weeks and we need creative, authentic content that resonates with our target audience. We value quality over quantity.",
  "objective": "engagement",
  "start_date": "2025-11-10",
  "end_date": "2025-11-25",
  "budget": 10000,
  "number_of_influencers": 20,
  "campaign_image": "https://example.com/brand.jpg",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "task": "Instagram Post",
      "description": "Create an Instagram post",
      "site_id": 4,
      "is_repetitive": "no",
      "requires_url": "yes"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Brand owner creates a campaign. Uses userId as business_id.
